name: PATENTS_FOR_DOUBLE_HIGH_EXPRESSION_TARGETPAIRS
description: Patents for double high expression target pairs. Auto-generated from the core-four benchmark and aligned to the validated query-frame Cypher semantics.
cypher:
MATCH (tp:TargetPair)-[:HAS_TARGET]->(t1:Target)-[:DIFFERENTIAL_AND_HIGHLY_EXPRESSED_IN]->(c:Cancer {name: $cancer})
MATCH (tp)-[:HAS_TARGET]->(t2:Target)-[:DIFFERENTIAL_AND_HIGHLY_EXPRESSED_IN]->(c)
WHERE t1 <> t2
MATCH (tp)<-[:HAS_TARGET_PAIR]-(p:Patent)-[:PUBLISHED_IN]->(y:Year)
OPTIONAL MATCH (p)-[:HAS_ASSIGNEE]->(a:Assignee)
RETURN DISTINCT tp.name AS target_pair, p.pub_no AS patent_publication, y.year AS year, collect(DISTINCT a.name) AS assignees
ORDER BY year DESC, patent_publication
LIMIT 100

examples: For target pairs whose two targets are both highly expressed in HNSC, what are the patent publication numbers, publication years, and assignees?
For target pairs whose two targets are both highly expressed in UCS, what are the patent publication numbers, publication years, and assignees?
For target pairs whose two targets are both highly expressed in PCPG, what are the patent publication numbers, publication years, and assignees?
